# cz_gitmoji Type Reference

Full list of available types. Source: `shared/spec.py` in the `cz_gitmoji` package.

Commit prefix format: `{icon} {type}` (with a space between icon and type).

| Icon | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 🐛 | `fix` | Fix a bug. |
| ✨ | `feat` | Introduce new features. |
| 📝 | `docs` | Add or update documentation. |
| 🎨 | `style` | Improve structure / format of the code. |
| ♻️ | `refactor` | Refactor code. |
| ⚡️ | `perf` | Improve performance. |
| ✅ | `test` | Add, update, or pass tests. |
| 👷 | `build` | Add or update CI build system. |
| 💚 | `ci` | Fix CI Build. |
| ⏪️ | `revert` | Revert changes. |
| 🔥 | `dump` | Remove code or files. |
| 🚑️ | `hotfix` | Critical hotfix. |
| 🚀 | `deploy` | Deploy stuff. |
| 💄 | `ui` | Add or update the UI and style files. |
| 🎉 | `init` | Begin a project. |
| 🔒️ | `security` | Fix security issues. |
| 🔐 | `secret` | Add or update secrets. |
| 🔖 | `bump` | Release / Version tags. |
| 🚨 | `fix-lint` | Fix compiler / linter warnings. |
| 🚧 | `wip` | Work in progress. |
| ⬇️ | `dep-drop` | Downgrade dependencies. |
| ⬆️ | `dep-bump` | Upgrade dependencies. |
| 📌 | `pin` | Pin dependencies to specific versions. |
| 📈 | `analytics` | Add or update analytics or track code. |
| ➕ | `dep-add` | Add a dependency. |
| ➖ | `dep-rm` | Remove a dependency. |
| 🔧 | `config` | Add or update configuration files. |
| 🔨 | `script` | Add or update development scripts. |
| 🌐 | `lang` | Internationalization and localization. |
| ✏️ | `typo` | Fix typos. |
| 💩 | `poop` | Write bad code that needs to be improved. |
| 🔀 | `merge` | Merge branches. |
| 📦️ | `package` | Add or update compiled files or packages. |
| 👽️ | `external` | Update code due to external API changes. |
| 🚚 | `resource` | Move or rename resources (e.g.: files, paths, routes). |
| 📄 | `license` | Add or update license. |
| 💥 | `boom` | Introduce breaking changes. |
| 🍱 | `asset` | Add or update assets. |
| ♿️ | `accessibility` | Improve accessibility. |
| 💡 | `source-docs` | Add or update comments in source code. |
| 🍻 | `beer` | Write code drunkenly. |
| 💬 | `text` | Add or update text and literals. |
| 🗃️ | `db` | Perform database related changes. |
| 🔊 | `logs-add` | Add or update logs. |
| 🔇 | `logs-rm` | Remove logs. |
| 👥 | `people` | Add or update contributor(s). |
| 🚸 | `ux` | Improve user experience / usability. |
| 🏗️ | `arch` | Make architectural changes. |
| 📱 | `design` | Work on responsive design. |
| 🤡 | `mock` | Mock things. |
| 🥚 | `egg` | Add or update an easter egg. |
| 🙈 | `ignore` | Add or update a .gitignore file. |
| 📸 | `snap` | Add or update snapshots. |
| ⚗️ | `experiment` | Perform experiments. |
| 🔍️ | `seo` | Improve SEO. |
| 🏷️ | `types` | Add or update types. |
| 🌱 | `seed` | Add or update seed files. |
| 🚩 | `flag` | Add, update, or remove feature flags. |
| 🥅 | `catch` | Catch errors. |
| 💫 | `animation` | Add or update animations and transitions. |
| 🗑️ | `deprecation` | Deprecate code that needs to be cleaned up. |
| 🛂 | `auth` | Work on code related to authorization, roles and permissions. |
| 🩹 | `fix-simple` | Simple fix for a non-critical issue. |
| 🧐 | `exploration` | Data exploration/inspection. |
| ⚰️ | `dead` | Remove dead code. |
| 🧪 | `test-fail` | Add a failing test. |
| 👔 | `logic` | Add or update business logic. |
| 🩺 | `health` | Add or update healthcheck. |
| 🧱 | `infra` | Infrastructure related changes. |
| 🧑‍💻 | `devxp` | Improve developer experience. |
| 💸 | `money` | Add sponsorships or money related infrastructure. |
| 🧵 | `threading` | Add or update code related to multithreading or concurrency. |
| 🦺 | `validation` | Add or update code related to validation. |
| 🧹 | `chore` | Commit changes related to miscellaneous chores. |
| 👇 | `squash` | Squash commits. |
| 🫥 | `fixup` | Fixup commits. |
